Summary
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           * Method: set_fit_request(*, base_margin="$UNCHANGED$", base_margin_eval_set="$UNCHANGED$", eval_set="$UNCHANGED$", feature_weights="$UNCHANGED$", sample_weight="$UNCHANGED$", sample_weight_eval_set="$UNCHANGED$", verbose="$UNCHANGED$", xgb_model="$UNCHANGED$")

Syntax:

fit_request = model.set_fit_request(
    *,
    base_margin="$UNCHANGED$",
    base_margin_eval_set="$UNCHANGED$",
    eval_set="$UNCHANGED$",
    feature_weights="$UNCHANGED$",
    sample_weight="$UNCHANGED$",
    sample_weight_eval_set="$UNCHANGED$",
    verbose="$UNCHANGED$",
    xgb_model="$UNCHANGED$"
)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              *                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               * Parameters (Non‑Table Format):

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 * base_margin: Array-like of initial prediction margins for training data.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 * base_margin_eval_set: Array-like (or list of arrays) for evaluation sets’ base margins.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 * eval_set: A list or tuple of evaluation sets (each a tuple of (X, y)).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 * feature_weights: Array-like of per-feature weights.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 * sample_weight: Array-like of per-sample weights for training.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 * sample_weight_eval_set: A list of sample weight arrays for evaluation sets.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 * verbose: Controls the verbosity of the training output.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 * xgb_model: An existing XGBoost model or file path for continuing training.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    * Each parameter can be set to a new value or left as "$UNCHANGED$" to keep the existing value.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    * Return Value:
A fit request object (typically a dictionary) mapping each parameter name to its provided value (or "$UNCHANGED$" if not changed).

The five detailed examples illustrate various scenarios:

Each example includes code, simulated print outputs, and a pandas DataFrame summarizing the resulting fit request object.
































































































This is about Scikit-Learn API Give me set_params(**params) Full description Syntax Parameters description (in a non-table format) Return value give me 5 very detailed and good examples (make it long) give the result for each example with a pandas dataframe show me the print() output








Below is a comprehensive guide to the set_params(**params) method in the Scikit‑Learn API. This method is defined for all scikit‑learn estimators (including XGBoost’s scikit‑learn wrappers such as XGBRegressor and XGBClassifier) and is used to set the parameters of an estimator. It is essential for hyperparameter tuning, cloning estimators, and building parameter grids for grid search. When you call set_params(**params), each key-value pair in params is used to update the corresponding parameter in the estimator. If a parameter is not recognized, an error is raised. The method returns the estimator instance itself, allowing for method chaining.
________________


Full Description
The set_params(**params) method is part of scikit‑learn’s estimator API and is implemented in the BaseEstimator class. It allows you to update one or more parameters of an estimator after it has been constructed. This is particularly useful for:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          * Hyperparameter Tuning: When using tools like GridSearchCV or RandomizedSearchCV, scikit‑learn relies on set_params() to create new estimator instances with different hyperparameter values.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          * Cloning Estimators: The clone() function in scikit‑learn uses get_params() and set_params() to create a copy of an estimator.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          * Pipelines: In a pipeline, set_params() is used to set parameters for individual steps.

Key points:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             * Deep Parameter Setting: When set_params() is called, it will search recursively into any sub-estimators (if they are part of the estimator’s parameters) to set nested parameters.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             * Return Self: After setting the parameters, the method returns the estimator itself so that you can chain further method calls if desired.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             * Validation: The method checks that the parameter names provided are valid for the estimator. An invalid parameter name will raise an error.

________________


Syntax
estimator.set_params(**params)


                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                * estimator: An instance of a scikit‑learn estimator (for example, XGBRegressor).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                * params: Keyword arguments where each key is a parameter name and each value is the new parameter value.

________________


Parameters Description (Non‑Table Format)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   * **params:
A variable number of keyword arguments. Each key in params should correspond to a valid parameter name of the estimator (or a sub-estimator in a pipeline). The value assigned to each key is the new value for that parameter. For instance:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      * n_estimators=100

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      * max_depth=4

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      * learning_rate=0.05
 These values will update the internal state of the estimator accordingly.

________________


Return Value
Return Value:
 The method returns the estimator instance (self) after updating the parameters. This allows for method chaining, such as:

model.set_params(max_depth=4).fit(X, y)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         * ________________


5 Detailed Examples of set_params(**params)
Below are five detailed examples demonstrating various use cases of the set_params(**params) method. Each example includes a code snippet, an explanation, and a simulated pandas DataFrame showing key output.
________________


Example 1: Basic Update on an XGBRegressor
In this example, we create an XGBRegressor and update a single parameter (n_estimators) using set_params(). We then use get_params() to verify the update.
import xgboost as xgb
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd


# Create synthetic regression data
np.random.seed(42)
X = np.random.rand(50, 3)
y = 2.0 * X[:, 0] - 1.0 * X[:, 1] + 0.5 * X[:, 2] + np.random.randn(50) * 0.1


# Instantiate an XGBRegressor with initial parameters
model = xgb.XGBRegressor(n_estimators=10, max_depth=3, random_state=42)


# Update n_estimators to 20 using set_params
model.set_params(n_estimators=20)


# Retrieve parameters to verify update
params_after_update = model.get_params()


# Create a DataFrame summarizing the key parameters
df_ex1 = pd.DataFrame({
    "Parameter": ["n_estimators", "max_depth", "random_state"],
    "Value": [params_after_update["n_estimators"],
              params_after_update["max_depth"],
              params_after_update["random_state"]]
})
print("Example 1: Basic Update on an XGBRegressor")
print(df_ex1)


Simulated print() output:
Example 1: Basic Update on an XGBRegressor
      Parameter  Value
0  n_estimators     20
1     max_depth      3
2  random_state     42


________________


Example 2: Updating Multiple Parameters on an XGBClassifier
Here, we update several parameters at once (e.g., max_depth, learning_rate, and subsample) on an XGBClassifier using set_params(), and then verify the changes.
import xgboost as xgb
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd


# Generate synthetic binary classification data
np.random.seed(101)
X_cls = np.random.rand(100, 4)
y_cls = (X_cls[:, 0] + X_cls[:, 1] > 1).astype(int)


# Instantiate an XGBClassifier with initial parameters
model_cls = xgb.XGBClassifier(n_estimators=15, max_depth=3, learning_rate=0.1, subsample=1.0, random_state=101, use_label_encoder=False)


# Update multiple parameters
model_cls.set_params(max_depth=5, learning_rate=0.05, subsample=0.8)


# Retrieve updated parameters
params_cls_updated = model_cls.get_params()


df_ex2 = pd.DataFrame({
    "Parameter": ["max_depth", "learning_rate", "subsample"],
    "Value": [params_cls_updated["max_depth"], params_cls_updated["learning_rate"], params_cls_updated["subsample"]]
})
print("\nExample 2: Updating Multiple Parameters on an XGBClassifier")
print(df_ex2)


Simulated print() output:
Example 2: Updating Multiple Parameters on an XGBClassifier
       Parameter  Value
0      max_depth      5
1  learning_rate   0.05
2       subsample   0.8


________________


Example 3: Using set_params() in a Pipeline
In this example, an XGBoost estimator is used as part of a scikit‑learn pipeline. We update the parameters of the XGBoost step using set_params(), then check that the update was applied.
from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
import xgboost as xgb
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd


# Create a DataFrame with sample data
df = pd.DataFrame({
    "f1": np.random.rand(50),
    "f2": np.random.rand(50),
    "target": np.random.rand(50)
})
X_pipe = df[["f1", "f2"]]
y_pipe = df["target"]


# Build a pipeline with StandardScaler and XGBRegressor
pipeline = Pipeline([
    ("scaler", StandardScaler()),
    ("xgb", xgb.XGBRegressor(n_estimators=10, max_depth=3, learning_rate=0.1, random_state=42))
])
pipeline.fit(X_pipe, y_pipe)


# Update parameters of the XGBRegressor within the pipeline
pipeline.set_params(xgb__max_depth=6, xgb__learning_rate=0.05)


# Retrieve the updated parameters from the XGBRegressor step
updated_params = pipeline.named_steps["xgb"].get_params()


df_ex3 = pd.DataFrame({
    "Parameter": ["max_depth", "learning_rate"],
    "Value": [updated_params["max_depth"], updated_params["learning_rate"]]
})
print("\nExample 3: Using set_params() in a Pipeline")
print(df_ex3)


Simulated print() output:
Example 3: Using set_params() in a Pipeline
       Parameter  Value
0      max_depth      6
1  learning_rate   0.05


________________


Example 4: Cloning and Updating an Estimator
In this scenario, we retrieve the current parameters using get_params(), modify a few of them, and then create a new estimator instance with the updated parameters. This is useful in custom hyperparameter tuning routines.
import xgboost as xgb
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.base import clone


# Generate synthetic data
np.random.seed(303)
X_clone = np.random.rand(30, 3)
y_clone = X_clone[:, 0]*2.0 + np.random.randn(30)*0.1


# Create an initial XGBRegressor
model_original = xgb.XGBRegressor(n_estimators=10, max_depth=3, random_state=303)
model_original.fit(X_clone, y_clone)


# Retrieve current parameters and update max_depth
current_params = model_original.get_params(deep=True)
current_params["max_depth"] = 5


# Create a new instance with updated parameters using clone or direct constructor
model_updated = type(model_original)(**current_params)


# Fit the updated model on the same data
model_updated.fit(X_clone, y_clone)


df_ex4 = pd.DataFrame({
    "Parameter": ["max_depth"],
    "Original_Value": [model_original.get_params()["max_depth"]],
    "Updated_Value": [model_updated.get_params()["max_depth"]]
})
print("\nExample 4: Cloning and Updating an Estimator")
print(df_ex4)


Simulated print() output:
Example 4: Cloning and Updating an Estimator
  Parameter  Original_Value  Updated_Value
0  max_depth               3              5


________________


Example 5: Updating Estimator Parameters for Custom Hyperparameter Search
This example simulates a scenario where you iterate over several hyperparameter settings manually. We update the estimator’s parameters, fit the model, and record a performance metric. Finally, we summarize the results in a DataFrame.
import xgboost as xgb
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.metrics import r2_score


# Generate synthetic regression data
np.random.seed(404)
X_search = np.random.rand(100, 3)
y_search = 2.0 * X_search[:, 0] - 1.0 * X_search[:, 1] + np.random.randn(100)*0.1


X_train_search, X_test_search, y_train_search, y_test_search = train_test_split(X_search, y_search, test_size=0.2, random_state=404)


# Define hyperparameter candidates
param_grid = [
    {"n_estimators": 10, "max_depth": 3, "learning_rate": 0.1},
    {"n_estimators": 10, "max_depth": 4, "learning_rate": 0.05},
    {"n_estimators": 20, "max_depth": 3, "learning_rate": 0.1},
]


results = []
# Start with a base model
base_model = xgb.XGBRegressor(random_state=404)


for params in param_grid:
    # Clone the base model to ensure independence
    model_tmp = type(base_model)(**base_model.get_params())
    # Update parameters using set_params
    model_tmp.set_params(**params)
    model_tmp.fit(X_train_search, y_train_search, verbose=False)
    score = r2_score(y_test_search, model_tmp.predict(X_test_search))
    results.append({
        "n_estimators": params["n_estimators"],
        "max_depth": params["max_depth"],
        "learning_rate": params["learning_rate"],
        "R2_Score": score
    })


df_ex5 = pd.DataFrame(results)
print("\nExample 5: Updating Estimator Parameters for Custom Hyperparameter Search")
print(df_ex5)


Simulated print() output:
Example 5: Updating Estimator Parameters for Custom Hyperparameter Search
   n_estimators  max_depth  learning_rate  R2_Score
0            10          3           0.10    0.8654
1            10          4           0.05    0.8921
2            20          3           0.10    0.8775


________________

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          * Method: set_params(**params) in the Scikit‑Learn API

Syntax:

estimator.set_params(**params)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 * Parameters:
Accepts a variable number of keyword arguments where each key is a valid parameter name for the estimator (or its sub-estimators) and the value is the new setting. No additional parameters.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           * Return Value:
Returns the estimator instance (self) after updating, allowing for method chaining.
